info.name: Core Bank System API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the Core Banking System REST API. Covers authentication, user management, accounts, transactions, profiles, notifications, and audit logs.

Base URL: {{baseUrl}} (default: http://localhost:8080)
API Prefix: /api/v1
Auth: Bearer Token (JWT)

Standard Response Envelope:
{
  "code": 200,
  "message": "Success message",
  "data": { },
  "errors": null
}

variable.description: JWT access token, auto-set after login
JWT refresh token, auto-set after login
Admin JWT token for admin-only endpoints
UUID of an audit log entry

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints. Includes registration, login, token refresh, and logout. Most endpoints are public; Get Current User requires authentication.

request.description: Register a new user account. Public endpoint, no authentication required.
Authenticate user and receive JWT tokens. Public endpoint.
Get the currently authenticated user's information. Requires Bearer token.
Refresh the access token using a valid refresh token. Public endpoint.
Invalidate the refresh token to log out. Public endpoint.

item.name: Users
item.description: User management endpoints. All endpoints require ADMIN role via adminToken. Supports CRUD operations for users and admins, including user+profile creation.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of all users. ADMIN only.
Retrieve a specific user by UUID. ADMIN only.
Create a new user account. ADMIN only.
Create a new admin user. ADMIN only.

body.raw:
{
  "user": {
    "username": "profileuser",
    "password": "Pass@1234"
  },
  "profile": {
    "type": "KTP",
    "expiryDate": "2030-12-31",
    "identityNumber": "3201234567890001",
    "name": "John Doe",
    "country": "Indonesia",
    "placeOfBirth": "Jakarta",
    "dateOfBirth": "1990-05-15",
    "gender": "MALE",
    "phone": "+6281234567890",
    "nationality": "Indonesian",
    "maritalStatus": "SINGLE",
    "religion": "Islam",
    "address": "Jl. Sudirman No. 1",
    "building": "Tower A",
    "rt": "001",
    "rw": "002",
    "province": "DKI Jakarta",
    "occupation": "Software Engineer",
    "officeName": "PT Tech Corp",
    "officeAddress": "Jl. Thamrin No. 10",
    "officePhone": "+62211234567"
  }
}

request.description: Create a new user with a complete identity profile. ADMIN only.
Update an existing user's credentials. ADMIN only.
Update an existing admin user's credentials. ADMIN only.
Delete an admin user by UUID. ADMIN only.

item.name: Accounts
item.description: Bank account management. Admin endpoints for full CRUD and status management. User self-service endpoints for viewing accounts, balances, mutations, and PIN changes.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of all bank accounts. ADMIN only.
Retrieve a specific account by UUID. ADMIN only.
Retrieve paginated mutations for a specific account. ADMIN only. Optional query params: startDate, endDate (yyyy-MM-dd), mutationType (DEBIT|CREDIT).
Create a new bank account for a user. ADMIN only.
Update an existing account's details. ADMIN only.
Update the status of an account (e.g., ACTIVE, FROZEN, CLOSED). ADMIN only.
Delete a bank account by UUID. ADMIN only.
Retrieve all accounts owned by the authenticated user. USER role.
Retrieve a specific account owned by the authenticated user. USER role.
Retrieve the current balance of a specific account. USER role.
Retrieve paginated mutations for the authenticated user's account. Optional: startDate, endDate, mutationType. USER role.
Change the PIN of the authenticated user's account. USER role.

item.name: Transactions
item.description: Financial transaction endpoints. Transfer, deposit, and withdrawal operations. Admin can view all transactions; users can view their own. Optional filters: startDate, endDate, type, minAmount, maxAmount.

request.description: Transfer funds between two accounts. Requires USER role and valid PIN.
Deposit funds into an account. ADMIN only.
Withdraw funds from an account. Requires USER role and valid PIN.
Retrieve paginated list of all transactions. ADMIN only. Optional filters: startDate, endDate, type, minAmount, maxAmount.
Retrieve paginated list of authenticated user's transactions. Optional filters: startDate, endDate, type, minAmount, maxAmount.
Retrieve a specific transaction by UUID. USER role.

item.name: Profiles
item.description: Identity profile management. Admin can view all profiles. Users can view, create, and update their own profile. Profile types: KTP, PASSPORT, SIM.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of all user profiles. ADMIN only.
Retrieve a specific profile by UUID. USER role.
Retrieve the authenticated user's profile. USER role.

body.raw:
{
  "type": "KTP",
  "expiryDate": "2030-12-31",
  "identityNumber": "3201234567890001",
  "name": "John Doe",
  "country": "Indonesia",

request.description: Update the authenticated user's profile. USER role.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: User notification management. All endpoints require USER role. Supports listing notifications, checking unread count, and marking notifications as read.

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of the authenticated user's notifications. USER role.
Get the count of unread notifications for the authenticated user. USER role.
Mark a specific notification as read. USER role.
Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user. USER role.

item.name: Audit Logs
item.description: Audit trail endpoints. Admin can view all logs; users can view their own. Optional filters: userId (admin), action (LOGIN, LOGOUT, ACCOUNT_CREATED, ACCOUNT_STATUS_UPDATED, ACCOUNT_DELETED, TRANSACTION_TRANSFER, TRANSACTION_DEPOSIT, TRANSACTION_WITHDRAWAL, PIN_CHANGE), startDate, endDate (ISO instant).

request.description: Retrieve paginated list of all audit logs. ADMIN only. Optional filters: userId, action, startDate, endDate.
Retrieve paginated list of the authenticated user's audit logs. Optional filters: action, startDate, endDate.
Retrieve a specific audit log entry by UUID. ADMIN only.
